summary: Verified P0 fixes: 1) Login screen shows all 5 auth options (Google, Apple, Email, Create Account, Guest) with correct data-testid attributes. 2) HUD Display<->Navigation sync working correctly - Hide All removes compass/weather/controls from Navigation view, Show All restores them, Reset restores defaults. All 13 sidebar tabs navigable. Guest login works.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: LoginScreen.tsx has all 5 auth buttons with correct data-testid attributes (google-signin-btn, apple-signin-btn, email-signin-btn, email-register-btn, guest-signin-btn)
VERIFIED: Apple Sign-In button uses OAuthProvider('apple.com') via signInWithApple method in FirebaseProvider
VERIFIED: useHudConfig hook reads from event detail directly for immediate sync (lines 12-15, 22-24, 30-33)
VERIFIED: useSignPlacement hook has updateSignVisibility function that filters signs by hudLayout toggles
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx syncs sign visibility on hudLayout changes (lines 360-368)
VERIFIED: HudLayoutView.tsx dispatches hud-layout-changed event with config detail (line 260)
VERIFIED: Hide All/Show All/Reset buttons work correctly in Display tab

test_credentials.guest: Click 'Continue as Guest' button on login screen

context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 fixes verified: Apple Sign-In button added to login screen, HUD Display<->Navigation sync fixed. The sync works via CustomEvent dispatch from HudLayoutView and event listeners in useHudConfig hook. Sign visibility filtering done in useSignPlacement hook. Preview URL: https://hud-customizer-5.preview.emergentagent.com

login_screen_google_signin.details: Sign In with Google button visible with data-testid='google-signin-btn'

login_screen_apple_signin.details: Sign In with Apple button visible with data-testid='apple-signin-btn'

login_screen_email_signin.details: Sign In with Email button visible with data-testid='email-signin-btn'

login_screen_create_account.details: Create Account button visible with data-testid='email-register-btn'

login_screen_guest_signin.details: Continue as Guest button visible with data-testid='guest-signin-btn'

guest_login_flow.details: Guest login navigates to Dashboard successfully

navigation_view_loads.details: Navigation view loads with map, weather widget (45°F), compass rose, and map controls

display_tab_accessible.details: Display tab shows 'Display Layout' heading with Live Preview

display_tab_toggle_rows.details: Toggle rows with eye icons found for Compass Rose, Map Controls, Weather Overlay

hud_sync_hide_all.details: Hide All button hides compass rose, weather widget, and map controls in Navigation view

hud_sync_show_all.details: Show All button restores all HUD elements in Navigation view

hud_sync_reset.details: Reset button restores default HUD layout

sidebar_navigation.details: All 13 sidebar tabs navigable: Dashboard, Navigation, Load Board, Truck Stops, Pay Summary, Maintenance, History, Fuel Network, Community, ELD Logs, Offline Maps, Display, Settings

mocked_apis.none: No mocked APIs - Apple Sign-In button is present but requires Apple developer account + Firebase console setup to actually authenticate
